info.name: LetzGo API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the LetzGo ride-sharing backend.

## Auth Flow
1. Call `POST /api/v1/auth/send-otp` with a phone number
2. Call `POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp` (dev OTP: 123456)
3. Use the returned `access_token` as a Bearer token in the Authorization header
4. If new user, call `POST /api/v1/auth/register` to complete profile

## Ping & Match Flow (NEW)
1. Host creates a ride: `POST /api/v1/pings`
2. Guests discover nearby rides: `GET /api/v1/pings/nearby`
3. Guest requests to join: `POST /api/v1/matches/request`
4. Host sees pending requests: `GET /api/v1/pings/{ping_id}/requests`
5. Host accepts: `POST /api/v1/matches/request/{request_id}/accept`
6. Match created → chat unlocked
7. Host starts ride: `POST /api/v1/matches/{match_id}/start`
8. Host completes ride: `POST /api/v1/matches/{match_id}/complete`

request.description: Get app name, version, and status.
Simple health check endpoint.
Send OTP to phone number. In development, always returns 123456.
Verify OTP and authenticate user. Returns JWT token. Use dev OTP: 123456.
Complete user registration/profile after OTP verification (for new users).
Admin login. Requires a user with is_admin=True. Returns JWT token.
Get current authenticated user's profile.
Update current user's profile fields.
Get another user's public profile (limited fields). Requires auth.
Host creates a new ride ping.

query.description: Optional: filter by user gender (male, female)

request.description:
Main feed: discover nearby ride pings within 500m radius.
Returns limited host profile (gender, rating, trust_level).
Automatically filters: open only, not blocked, not expired, capacity available, gender compatible.
Get full details of a specific ride ping.
Update a ride ping (host only). Ride must still be open.
Cancel a ride ping (host only).

Host views all pending join requests for their ride.
Returns guest info: id, name, gender, rating_avg.

Guest requests to join a ride ping.
Enforces: gender rule, capacity check, blocked user check, duplicate prevention.
Host accepts a guest's join request. Creates a Match and increments current_passengers.
Host declines a guest's join request.

query.description: Optional: filter by status (matched, in_progress, completed, cancelled)

request.description: Get all matches for the current user.
Get details of a specific match with ride info.
Host marks the ride as started.
Host marks the ride as completed.
Get overall admin dashboard statistics.
Get ride cancellation rate statistics.
List all users with optional filtering and pagination.
Get detailed info about a specific user.
Block a user. Cannot block admin users.
Unblock a previously blocked user.
List all active (matched / in_progress) rides.
List all completed rides.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, reviewed, resolved, dismissed

request.description: List all user reports (excludes unsafe_meetup reason).
Update report status. Options: reviewed, resolved, dismissed.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, reviewed, resolved, dismissed

request.description: List unsafe meetup point reports (reason = unsafe_meetup).
List all disputed rides.
Resolve or dismiss a dispute. Status options: resolved, dismissed.
